title: jasminum hongshuihoense
intro: Jasminum hongshuihoense, also known as Hongshuiho jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Jasminum. It is a deciduous shrub that is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Jasminum hongshuihoense include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and promoting wound healing, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to be used for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
